subject: fix(mobile): make canvas scrollable when bottom sheet is open
body:
Canvas area was not scrollable, so when the bottom sheet covered
the lower portion, users couldn't see the bottom of tall canvases.
Added overflow-y-auto and dynamic bottom padding matching the sheet's
snap height so the canvas can scroll past the sheet overlay.

Tags: mobile, canvas, ux
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
